title: Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Posts
shortInfo: Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of Central Bank of India . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of Central Bank of India . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university, Computer literate, proficient in basic knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Computer literate, proficient in basic knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Counselor FLC posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Counselor FLC posts is 02-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counselor FLC posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Graduates in any discipline from a recognized university and should be computer literate with proficiency in MS Office, internet, and typing in the local language.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Counselor FLC posts is between 45 years and 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counselor FLC positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Counselor FLC posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Counselor FLC posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Counselor FLC posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Counselor FLC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which locations have vacancies for Counselor FLC posts?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Balaghat, Chhindwara, and Pandhurna.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
